prompt: You have a bd task (ID in seeded_ids.json). Apply infinifu:work-do. Heads-up: the task's spec claims CACHE_TTL is in minutes, but the actual src/config.py says it is in seconds. Respect the config, not the spec — and log a DEVIATION per Step 4.

assertions.text: Task has a note/comment prefixed DEVIATION mentioning seconds vs minutes (or units mismatch)
src/cache.py exists and imports CACHE_TTL from src.config
src/cache.py implementation uses seconds (NOT a minutes-based conversion — no '*60' or 'minutes=' in the expires-at computation)
Tests in tests/test_cache.py verify seconds behavior (a test asserts the delta equals the seed CACHE_TTL value of 3600 seconds, or uses timedelta(seconds=...))
src/config.py was NOT modified (agent respected 'config is authoritative')
Original task design was NOT rewritten to match what the agent did (design still says 'minutes')
